name: dev-loop
description: Generic single-pass PRD + skillwiki dev cycle engine. v1.12.0: dep-drift detector via dev-loop:doctor-worker (sonnet) probing dependencies.yaml at REFRESH and setup-dev-loop; required-missing blocks, optional-missing warns + DEP_DRIFT session var drives fallback paths; wrapper-agent pattern documented. MERGE CI gate uses ci-health-worker agent (sonnet). IDLE CI health agent (sonnet). Execution subagents hard-wired to sonnet. Simplify-worker agent for code review gate. Pluggable interview phase (native / grill-with-docs / grill-me). /setup-dev-loop scaffolds all 12 config sections (Sections A-L). Pluggable knowledge backends, drift guard, project-agnostic.
